_meta.purpose: Closing sentences in Hinglish. Natural wrap-up — recommendation, plan to return, or simple sign-off. Mix of styles.
rules: Some endings are just one short casual sentence — very real
Recommendation should feel like telling a friend, not writing an ad
Use 'zaroor aao', 'try karo' — Indian recommendation style

5star: Highly recommend karta hoon — ek baar try zaroor karo.
Apne dosto aur family ko bhi bol diya hai yahan aane ke liye.
Wapas aaunga definitely, treatment continue karunga.
Bina soche samjhe recommend karunga kisi ko bhi.
Ek baar aao bas, khud fark mahsoos karoge.
Already next appointment le li hai.
Jo bhi homeopathy dhundh raha hai, yahan aaye bilkul.
Puri family ko yahan shift kar diya hai ab.
Trust karo is jagah pe — kaam karti hai.
Shukriya doctor sahab, bahut help mili.
Itna satisfied hoon ki kisi ko bhi suggest karunga bina hesitation ke.
10/10 — aur kuch nahi kehna.
Bas ek baar aao, aage khud samajh jaoge.
Bahut khush hoon is decision se, recommend karta hoon.
Agar koi bol raha hai operation hi karna padega — pehle ek baar Dr. Verma se milo.
Stone ki problem hai kisi ko bhi? Seedha Dr. Verma ke paas bhejo, time waste mat karo.
Ek doctor se doosre doctor bhagta raha — ab sirf Dr. Verma pe trust hai.
Surgery ka darr tha — Dr. Verma ne woh darr khatam kar diya.
Jo log sochte hain homeopathy slow hoti hai, Dr. Verma unka belief change kar denge.
Bina operation stone nikalna — yeh Dr. Verma ke paas possible hai, maine khud dekha.
4star: Recommend karunga jo log homeopathy try karna chahte hain.
Wapas aaunga future visits ke liye.
Overall suggest karunga is clinic ko.
Acchi jagah hai, visit karke dekho.
Friends ko bhi bata dunga yahan ke baare mein.
3star: Dekhte hain aage kya hota hai.
